An update is available for java-17-openjdk.

CVE-2026-41254.title: Little CMS (lcms2) through 2.18 has an integer overflow in CubeSi ...
CVE-2026-41254.description: Little CMS (lcms2) through 2.18 has an integer overflow in CubeSize in cmslut.c because the overflow check is performed after the multiplication.
